qa_pairs.question: Where can I find more details about the Fast Track process, including eligibility?
qa_pairs.answer: To know more about eligibility and other details about the Fast Track process, you can visit the RAC Fast Track Application Guide page.

qa_pairs.question: What types of resources are available for researchers to access through this competition?
qa_pairs.answer: Through this competition, researchers can request access to a broad spectrum of advanced computing services, including technical support and training. The specific resources available are General-purpose systems, Large shared memory systems, General-purpose computing on graphics processing units, Storage, and Cloud.
